brief_notes: Exceptional paper - very detailed methods/results. All numbers verified: coordinates (-0.2 to +0.8), n=5/7/5/6/5/7, 200 uM, 200 nL, cFos counts (44.7, 104.5, 89.7, 123.1 etc), ABD durations (2.4+-1.1, 17.6+-2.7, 17.1+-3.3), 88.7 s lead, VT 10.8+-0.5, VO2 -33%/-25%, ANOVA stats, KW/Dunn p-values. Named citations throughout. Five-part result structure is elegant.
